messages.content: What color is the sky on a clear day?
The sky appears blue on a clear day.
How many days are in a week?
There are seven days in a week.
What is the capital of France?
The capital of France is Paris.
How many legs does a spider have?
A spider has eight legs.
What is the boiling point of water at sea level?
Water boils at one hundred degrees Celsius at sea level.
Who wrote the play Romeo and Juliet?
William Shakespeare wrote Romeo and Juliet.
What planet do we live on?
We live on planet Earth.
What is two plus two?
Two plus two equals four.
What gas do plants absorb from the air?
Plants absorb carbon dioxide from the air.
How many continents are there?
There are seven continents on Earth.
What is the largest ocean on Earth?
The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
What animal is known as the king of the jungle?
The lion is often called the king of the jungle.
How many sides does a triangle have?
A triangle has three sides.
What language is mostly spoken in Brazil?
Portuguese is the main language spoken in Brazil.
What is the chemical symbol for water?
The chemical symbol for water is H2O.
How many minutes are in an hour?
There are sixty minutes in an hour.
What is the freezing point of water in Celsius?
Water freezes at zero degrees Celsius.
Which planet is known as the red planet?
Mars is known as the red planet.
What is the tallest mountain in the world?
Mount Everest is the tallest mountain in the world.
How many strings does a standard guitar have?
A standard guitar has six strings.
What is the smallest prime number?
The smallest prime number is two.
Which organ pumps blood in the human body?
The heart pumps blood in the human body.
How many colors are in a rainbow?
A rainbow has seven colors.
What is the largest mammal on Earth?
The blue whale is the largest mammal on Earth.
How many wheels does a tricycle have?
A tricycle has three wheels.
What instrument has black and white keys?
A piano has black and white keys.
How many players are on a soccer team on the field?
A soccer team has eleven players on the field.
What is the largest desert in the world?
The Sahara is the largest hot desert in the world.
How many bones are in the adult human body?
The adult human body has two hundred and six bones.
What is the speed of light in a vacuum?
Light travels at about three hundred thousand kilometers per second in a vacuum.
How many letters are in the English alphabet?
There are twenty-six letters in the English alphabet.
What is the largest planet in our solar system?
Jupiter is the largest planet in our solar system.
